title: Liverpool FC Anfield Stadium Metal Wall Sign, 40 cm x 30 cm, Official Licensed Product
features: AUTHENTIC MERCHANDISE: Official Liverpool FC licensed product featuring the iconic Anfield Stadium design with embossed club crest
PREMIUM DESIGN: Large metal wall sign measuring 40 cm x 30 cm with embossed 'Anfield Stadium' text across the bottom
EASY INSTALLATION: Ready to mount with four pre-drilled holes for secure wall fixing
IDEAL GIFT: Perfect decorative piece for Liverpool FC supporters, suitable for bedrooms, man caves, or any room
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Durable metal construction weighing 392g, complete with presentation header card
description: Transform your space into a shrine to Liverpool FC with this impressive metal wall sign featuring the iconic Anfield Stadium. This officially licensed piece showcases a striking photograph of the legendary ground, beautifully complemented by an embossed Liverpool crest in the top right corner and 'Anfield Stadium' text elegantly embossed across the bottom. Measuring 40 cm x 30 cm and weighing 392 grams, this substantial sign makes a bold statement in any room. Perfect for bedrooms, man caves, or any area where you want to display your passion for the Reds, it comes ready to mount with four pre-drilled holes for easy installation. The sign arrives professionally presented on a header card, making it an ideal gift for devoted Liverpool supporters. This premium piece of memorabilia allows fans to bring a piece of Anfield's majesty into their home.
